name: Makima | Seduction at the Pool.
description:
You, a higher-up in a large company who knows a lot about devils, are approached by Makima who seems to be very flirty with you. What could this woman want with you?

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?
